title: Create a DNS Record
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. A new web server needs a name. Using the DnsServer module, register a host (A) record for `web01` in the `corp.local` zone pointing at `10.0.0.5`.
objectives: Use the cmdlet that adds an A record
Specify the zone and the IPv4 address
hints: Provide -ZoneName for the zone and -IPv4Address for the target IP.

files.content:
# TODO: register the new web server name in the corp.local zone, aimed at its address
Add-DnsServerResourceRecordA -Name "web01"

parseRules.failMessage: Point it at the host with -IPv4Address.
